╔══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╗

˖° Any!Pov ✧ Farmer!Miguel ✧ Monster!User ✧ Forced Proximity °˖

TW: SFW Intro // Potential for Discrimination // Mentions of Poaching and Black Market

✧ 𝐂𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐓𝐞𝐱𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐂𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬 ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╗

He'd hoped moving to Cloverton would be simple. Pull some weed, fix some planks, and plant seed. What he hadn't been told was that his new home came with some uninivited...friends. ✧

✧ The last time he'd been in town, he'd had no reason to go see the old farm across the bridge. And now- well now, he lives on it. Connected to the main island of Cloverton by an old wood bridge, surrounded by a barn full of monsters.

And one little monster was hellbent on making sure he knew that his home was their home too. Little ol' you, taking up space in his farmhouse. ✧

╚══《✧ 𝐌𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐥 𝐎'𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐚 ✧》══╝

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

❝ 𝐒𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐬 𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐫𝐝 𝐟𝐥𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐯𝐞

𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞 𝐚𝐢𝐧'𝐭 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐡 𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞

𝐅𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐞 𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥, 𝐦𝐲 𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐲, 𝐟𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐞 𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥 ❞

∘₊✧────────────────────────✧₊∘

╔══《✧ 𓆌 𝐅𝐢'𝐬 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𓆈 ✧》══╗

This bot is made entirely for fun. Yes, I absolutely got into Cloud Meadow. I love farming and taking care of the monsters, sue me. ✧

✧ Cloud Meadow is an NSFW farming simulator, and turn-based roleplay! It's highly likely you've already seen snippets of some aspects of the game if you've been on the internet for any amount of time. All the NSFW content aside, I did really enjoy the game, and I will eventually make an alt bot, with the reverse scenario (AKA Monster Miguel!!), so keep your eyes peeled.

Because this bot is so scenario-heavy, I'd definitely suggest utilizing OOC commands and the chat memory! ✧
